robloxapi-desc: Provides easy access to the Roblox API via parser functions.
robloxapi-error-no-arguments: Please provide a valid data source!
robloxapi-error-user-group-not-found: Failed to find the group data for the given user! The user may not be in the group.
robloxapi-error-request-rate-limited: The request failed due to rate limits enforced by Roblox. Please try again later or avoid using the $1 data source too many times.
robloxapi-error-request-cancelled-rate-l: The request was cancelled because prior requests sent to the $1 data source resulted in rate limiting.
robloxapi-error-arg-not-allowed: Value $1 is not allowed for argument of type ''$2''!
robloxapi-error-missing-argument: A required argument of type ''$1'' is missing!
robloxapi-error-missing-optional-argumen: Incorrectly formatted optional argument! Note that optional arguments must be in the format of ''key=value''.
robloxapi-error-too-many-required-args: The argument ''$1'' exceeds the maximum number of required arguments for this data source! Please refer to the documentation.
robloxapi-error-usage-limit: The ''$1'' data source can only be used $2 times per page!
robloxapi-error-usage-limit-dependent: The ''$1'' data source (called through dependent data source ''$3'') can only be used $2 times per page!
robloxapi-category-deprecated-parser-fun: Pages using deprecated RobloxAPI parser functions
The page uses a deprecated parser function provided by the RobloxAPI extension.
robloxapi-category-error-desc: The page uses the {{#robloxAPI}} parser function incorrectly, resulting in an error.
robloxapi-error-invalid-choice-argument: Invalid choice $1 for argument of type ''$3''! Possible values are: $2.
robloxapi-error-invalid-generic-argument: Invalid value $1 for argument of type ''$2''!
